747840.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_B
747840.transcript: Where do I buy stamina like that?

7972216.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_B
7972216.transcript: We're on a roll! But don't get cocky!

16765142.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_quest_clear_1
16765142.transcript: Haha! Like evil could defeat us!

32811837.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_B
32811837.transcript: You guys make a fine pair! But we're the perfect crew!

45619957.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0800
45619957.transcript: Aww, Lancy! I'm not goin' anywhere!

46552509.label: PL0900_vo_MOV_wait_C_2
46552509.transcript: Hmm hmm hmm, hmm hmm, hmm hmm hmm hmm hmm hmm.

50923055.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_2
50923055.transcript: Yeah! Bring it on, bad guys!

88800247.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL1000_2
88800247.transcript: Hey, little reckless thing is my schtick.

93600208.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_quest_clear_6
93600208.transcript: And that, my friend, is how it's done!

96065989.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
96065989.transcript: Behold! The splendiferous Lord of Flames!

98256166.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
98256166.transcript: Next time, we go bigger and bolder!

104575755.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
104575755.transcript: They're not gonna be pushovers, are they? Get ready!

110065337.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_2
110065337.transcript: There you go! Back at it!

112157251.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
112157251.transcript: I got cross-eyed trying to watch you!

117708677.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
117708677.transcript: It's an all-out brawl! Don't let them surround us!

122202222.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_A
122202222.transcript: No one oughta be takin' orders from you!

123803722.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_B
123803722.transcript: Just wait 'til I get a hold of you!

124085403.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1000_2
124085403.transcript: I'll wait till I get my hands on 'em.

125807981.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_C
125807981.transcript: Do your worst! We can take it!

126553429.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
126553429.transcript: Sorry, Mister General Sir! We gotta kick you off our ship!

130533087.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
130533087.transcript: Yeah! You just got the axe!

133756118.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_win1_1
133756118.transcript: Heh heh! I always knew we could do it!

135459233.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1800
135459233.transcript: That attack was a work of art!

137715327.label: PL0900_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
137715327.transcript: You should never have messed with us!

143106222.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
143106222.transcript: What's cooler than protecting your friends, right?

148982671.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
148982671.transcript: And my muscles appreciate being appreciated!

161939473.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST
161939473.transcript: It's on our side? I'll take it!

164262544.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
164262544.transcript: Personally speaking, I like to think of myself as a ray of sunshine.

164882724.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900
164882724.transcript: We gotta look out for each other, right?

165555259.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
165555259.transcript: This monster's a beaut! Let's take 'em down!

167270111.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_win2_2
167270111.transcript: Mission complete! So, who wants food?

172200571.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
172200571.transcript: Yeah! Who's a good boy? I'm a good boy!

174457216.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
174457216.transcript: We gotta get to the monastery before I freeze my quads off!

177738902.label: PL0900_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL0800_2
177738902.transcript: I'm right beside you, Lancy! I won't let them hurt you!

182854567.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0800_2
182854567.transcript: I'm so glad you've got my back.

182892615.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1400
182892615.transcript: Who else wants a piece of this?

183965711.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0600
183965711.transcript: The pleasure was all mine, ma'am.

189605977.label: PL0900_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1100_3
189605977.transcript: Get behind me! It's my turn to protect you!

198012605.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
198012605.transcript: I eat rampaging primals for breakfast!

207559948.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
207559948.transcript: Keep throwing yourselves at us! See where it gets you!

214177432.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_lockon_1
214177432.transcript: Vane of the White Dragons, ready to tango!

217668434.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_break
217668434.transcript: You want fries with that butt-kicking?

225632162.label: PL0900_vo_ATK_ability_6_3
225632162.transcript: What doesn't kill you makes you stronger!

226843529.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0800
226843529.transcript: Hang ten! Ride in the wave of glory!

230905681.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
230905681.transcript: Generals, it's been nice knowin' ya!

238996268.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
238996268.transcript: Oh yeah! Leave the rough stuff to me!

245601234.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
245601234.transcript: Enough kitty stuff! Let's take the gloves off!

258761773.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
258761773.transcript: Go bigger and harder than ever before!

260353423.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
260353423.transcript: This guy just won't see reason!

273946508.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
273946508.transcript: I'm here if you need anything, okay?

274269879.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1700
274269879.transcript: No one's gonna mess with us! Not on our watch!

286292192.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_3
286292192.transcript: Just leave it to Papa Vane!

287693866.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_A
287693866.transcript: Let's see if we can trip it up somehow!

296618506.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_A
296618506.transcript: Thank my lucky socks for you!

305494403.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_A
305494403.transcript: Don't give 'em a chance to counter!

306905631.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_4
306905631.transcript: Now, put me back in, Coach!

309389015.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1700
309389015.transcript: They won't mess with us again!

315581638.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_A
315581638.transcript: I've had enough of this dude's nonsense!

320067589.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
320067589.transcript: Now that's what I call positive thinking!

321029561.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
321029561.transcript: What is this power? It feels awesome!

325974217.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
325974217.transcript: Destroy this core thingy and we're home free!

329351014.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
329351014.transcript: Let's beat this purple lizard and get outta here!

344159863.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_buff_E_PL1100
344159863.transcript: Let's put them in the dirt!

349861066.label: PL0900_vo_NAV_get_snp_1
349861066.transcript: It's okay, little guy. I'm not gonna cook ya.

350538927.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1300
350538927.transcript: Couldn't have done that without you!

354744643.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
354744643.transcript: I will not let you down, Siegfried!

355316483.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
355316483.transcript: Not a problem! I got energy for days!

365179004.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
365179004.transcript: Don't let 'em make it to Historia!

377225673.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_win2_1
377225673.transcript: Go team! High fives all around!

379590727.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_B
379590727.transcript: You don't wanna do this, Id!

406339468.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1800
406339468.transcript: Nope! I earned the title fair and square!

412408410.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
412408410.transcript: Id! You and I are a winning team!

419551349.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
419551349.transcript: And I'll totally not disappoint you again!

424658084.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
424658084.transcript: I don't care if you are a god! I'll beat your face!

428949482.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B
428949482.transcript: We are at the top of our game!

430721120.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1700
430721120.transcript: Man, I wish I could lift as much as you!

434465089.label: PL0900_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
434465089.transcript: Whoa! How'd you wind up here?

436190229.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_win1_3
436190229.transcript: Aw, come on! Where's the challenge?

439587040.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
439587040.transcript: Aww, you wanna be a big happy family?

439599960.label: PL0900_vo_ATK_ability_1_1_1
439599960.transcript: Gather up! I won't let them hurt you!

451806454.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_FIRST
451806454.transcript: Wouldn't wish this place on my worst enemy!

455573380.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue1_B_PL0800_2
455573380.transcript: Come on! We fight as a pair!

466550645.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
466550645.transcript: Huh? Oh yeah, he's a hefty boy.

475762822.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_A_3
475762822.transcript: You guys are just the best!

476044481.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
476044481.transcript: Excellent form is my middle name!

476921860.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1500
476921860.transcript: It's like our muscles were sending signals to each other!

479826237.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
479826237.transcript: Okay! I won't let you down!

488115023.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
488115023.transcript: We got this in the bag!

501755097.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_FIRST
501755097.transcript: All this evil nonsense ends today!

514333595.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_overdrive
514333595.transcript: Hah! Dirty little thing, ain't it!

519900786.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
519900786.transcript: Dang! Arvess's flame was almost as hot as Percy's!

529060329.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
529060329.transcript: Why not? You'd make a great friend!

547170043.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
547170043.transcript: Don't leave anything on the table!

548023166.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
548023166.transcript: Second serving of justice coming right up!

550481924.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL1100_3
550481924.transcript: Let's get you on your feet.

550948240.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
550948240.transcript: You uh... talkin' to me or... meditatin'?

558445660.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0600
558445660.transcript: Always down to jive for justice!

559607377.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C
559607377.transcript: While evil walks, justice never sleeps.

574092683.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1400
574092683.transcript: You're already like the epitome of kick-butt!

587560589.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1800
587560589.transcript: Like you gotta pee after you win?

588442644.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_3
588442644.transcript: Agh! That barely hurt at all!

614626661.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
614626661.transcript: Dang! Winry here is no joke! Hunker down!

614859134.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
614859134.transcript: And the next'll be the stuff of legend!

620841965.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
620841965.transcript: Nice shot! Now give me another just like it!

623274067.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_1st_C
623274067.transcript: Can't last much longer like this!

625407372.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
625407372.transcript: Hmph, remind you? You've opened your last gate!

627013532.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
627013532.transcript: Right? We whooped those suckers good!

628870980.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1000_3
628870980.transcript: I'll say it's more than that!

628941670.label: PL0900_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1000_2
628941670.transcript: See, this is what you get for fighting without backup!

634943364.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
634943364.transcript: I gotcha! One little Skyfarer's lunch a la Vane, comin' right up!

647609728.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_C
647609728.transcript: No one gets hurt under my protection!

648443219.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
648443219.transcript: You jokers don't stand a chance!

652008300.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_A
652008300.transcript: Let me at 'em! Let me at 'em!

652263280.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_recovery_C_PL1100
652263280.transcript: I'll make this up to you! I promise!

664699676.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_buff_E_PL1000
664699676.transcript: You were wise to give me this power.

666287877.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
666287877.transcript: It's time we shut this bad boy down!

671260382.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_lockon_4
671260382.transcript: Last chance to run, bad dudes!

672324072.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
672324072.transcript: I'll see this crew protected, one way or another!

681668720.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
681668720.transcript: Oh, you better start expecting even more!

686065586.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
686065586.transcript: Ah, Percy! Such a drama king!

694435562.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
694435562.transcript: It's cool. Just think of him as a tiny Lancey.

704142059.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_A
704142059.transcript: Can't rest until the job's all done!

711000755.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
711000755.transcript: Thanks! Maybe I should start a fan club!

712520139.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
712520139.transcript: Stay behind me, guys! Let me do the thwacking!

720055330.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
720055330.transcript: Oh, your little buddies are getting a treat after this!

721155259.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
721155259.transcript: I can't wait to do that again!

727117071.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_FIRST
727117071.transcript: Let's take that castle back, baby!

740597050.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_C
740597050.transcript: Hah! Put some sauce on that one!

743005054.label: PL0900_vo_NAV_hp_down_reaction_2
743005054.transcript: Pull back! I'm coming to help!

744067934.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
744067934.transcript: What a great idea! I'll be sous chef!

753073783.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_C
753073783.transcript: Jeez, guys, how much longer till we get to the top?

756965277.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1900
756965277.transcript: Got it. Keep a level head—or a clear head. But not a big head.

762479534.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
762479534.transcript: Your flimsy little swords are no match for my big axe!

764919758.label: PL0900_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_C
764919758.transcript: So I can't get up close and personal with 'em!

774777495.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL1000_3
774777495.transcript: Come on, Firelord! Back to it!

778388974.label: PL0900_vo_ATK_ability_1_2_1
778388974.transcript: I'll protect you! Stick close to me!

787288188.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_B
787288188.transcript: A few more moves like that and we'll be sitting pretty!

788058190.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_3
788058190.transcript: Whoa, that means a lot to me! Thanks!

791440993.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1000
791440993.transcript: Come on, Percy! Would it kill you to be nice for a second?

792565334.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
792565334.transcript: I know your attack pattern now, bud!

816647896.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_FIRST
816647896.transcript: We can't let Ghandagoza have all the fun!

818407024.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
818407024.transcript: What do you think I live for?

823278342.label: PL0900_vo_SP_charge_speak_chain_1
823278342.transcript: There's more where that came from!

823517517.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
823517517.transcript: Every sky item's got its monster problems, huh?

830594598.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0500
830594598.transcript: I can massage that right out for ya.

838435672.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL0800
838435672.transcript: Back at it! Let me at 'em!

841970805.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_B
841970805.transcript: Pick on somebody your own size!

842384142.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1100
842384142.transcript: Can't keep a good Vane down!

849371835.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL1100_3
849371835.transcript: Knock me down nine times, I'll get up ten!

854253524.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1700
854253524.transcript: Yeah! There's more where that came from!

867154561.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
867154561.transcript: If she's half as good as Ghandagoza or Id, we're in trouble.

874182105.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_lose_5st_1_FIRST
874182105.transcript: She's not even sweating, is she!

875356458.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
875356458.transcript: Vane, the fearless rhino! I like the sound of that!

876983196.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_3_FIRST
876983196.transcript: Ugh... It's cold, hits you right in the bones!

882158271.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
882158271.transcript: We can do this! Everyone, charge!

884317765.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
884317765.transcript: They're poppin' up everywhere! Like daisies!

898537335.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
898537335.transcript: Great! It's still fast as heck!

903608516.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_FIRST
903608516.transcript: Now he's got horns and a tail? Fine by me!

906087857.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
906087857.transcript: How do you get so built?

911168441.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_2
911168441.transcript: Ooh, felt the tingle on that one!

913601822.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
913601822.transcript: Yeah! They won't know what hit 'em!

914895704.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1100
914895704.transcript: Right back at you, Siegfried! It's like watching you fight for the first time, every time!

926563200.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_5_FIRST
926563200.transcript: Even Angra Mainyu has to have a weakness!

927544363.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
927544363.transcript: Booyah! We're coming for you, uh, other bad guys!

931797848.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
931797848.transcript: That's what I'm talkin' about, Percy!

952242987.label: PL0900_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1000
952242987.transcript: Not out for the count yet!

963752091.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
963752091.transcript: I'm Vane of the White Dragons!

964375905.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_win2_3
964375905.transcript: And that, my friend, is how it's done!

965691231.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_3_FIRST
965691231.transcript: We're ready for ya this time!

973165932.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_3chain
973165932.transcript: Well, I say the more the merrier!

981343010.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
981343010.transcript: Okay, that wind is not a good sign.

985845889.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
985845889.transcript: Ha! You won't beat my gains!

986737146.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
986737146.transcript: There's more than enough for everyone!

990691841.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1400
990691841.transcript: I got the next one too!

991053161.label: PL0900_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
991053161.transcript: Then help yourself to some justice!

995395053.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
995395053.transcript: You're a creepy son of a gun, but nothing we can't handle!

997346668.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
997346668.transcript: Yeah! We whipped up a frenzy, didn't we?

1003277964.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0800
1003277964.transcript: Got it! My arms are loose, my abs are tight!

1037233768.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1600
1037233768.transcript: Uh, no. But I admit we make a pretty sweet combo!

1047124232.label: PL0900_vo_ETC_quest_clear_2
1047124232.transcript: Woo! Kickin' butt and takin' names!

1050076139.label: PL0900_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
1050076139.transcript: Let 'em do their worst! I can take it!

4420095.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2600
4420095.transcript: Hey, you scratch my back, I scratch yours!

74880482.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
74880482.transcript: Nice one! You're up next, Fediel!

91809705.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1900
91809705.transcript: Hey, my man! Been working out?

107725452.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
107725452.transcript: Right! I never let a good chance go to waste!

115352206.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
115352206.transcript: Oh yeah! They got what they deserved!

127124149.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
127124149.transcript: Once I sink my teeth into the enemy, I never let go!

143990307.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
143990307.transcript: Let's finish this quick and cap off the win with good ol' rice balls!

208576970.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
208576970.transcript: Dude, bet you can hit a fly between the eyes!

215295569.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
215295569.transcript: Heh heh! It's my pride and joy, is what it is!

228001930.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
228001930.transcript: Oh, Gallanza! Way to butter me up!

266472944.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
266472944.transcript: Hey now, that's an idea I can get behind!

280737995.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0200
280737995.transcript: You'd be surprised what you can do when lives are at stake.

284966602.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
284966602.transcript: I don't know. Same way you kick holes through monsters!

291697651.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
291697651.transcript: Uh... feels like there's more to that comment.

297041865.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0400
297041865.transcript: Boom boom pow! On to the next round!

301234064.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
301234064.transcript: I think you mean, "That was perfect!"

307378797.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
307378797.transcript: Hear that, bad guys? Tea time awaits us!

313665519.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0600
313665519.transcript: Ooh, oucha! Sure hope I never get whipped like that!

337743015.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
337743015.transcript: Let me at 'em! Let me at 'em!

341894213.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1500
341894213.transcript: With guns like those, who needs cannons!

347730050.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
347730050.transcript: Thanks a bunch! See you for the next!

361157076.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
361157076.transcript: Whoa whoa whoa! A steel wall!

388182855.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2700
388182855.transcript: Booyah! Shoutout to my man Eustace!

391522197.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
391522197.transcript: Yep, mhm, I totally agree and understand!

395842262.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
395842262.transcript: Dude! I'm attacking as fast as I can!

441368050.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
441368050.transcript: Is it just me or is our crew getting some crazy firepower?

470018789.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
470018789.transcript: Good to know my training's paying off.

475213037.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2500
475213037.transcript: Ah, sorry Maggie. Got a little carried away there.

507164253.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
507164253.transcript: You know, little chop here, a big swing there! Ha ha! Nothing to it!

524300662.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2600
524300662.transcript: Dang! You know how to go off!

537344642.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
537344642.transcript: I'm always on the lookout for trouble.

550433818.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2900
550433818.transcript: We're just two awesome dragons doing their thing!

600432198.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2500
600432198.transcript: Oh man, I can't wait to grab a snack after this fight is over!

609554859.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1000
609554859.transcript: Wait, Percy! Is that concern I detect?

610045932.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
610045932.transcript: Whoa! You are the bomb, Charlotta!

631745291.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
631745291.transcript: When the going gets tough, the Vain gets shielded!

692679224.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0800
692679224.transcript: Lancey wipes the floor with you punks!

697797590.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
697797590.transcript: Couldn't lose it if I tried!

734781725.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
734781725.transcript: Watch out, evildoers! Here comes the wrecking crew!

743982351.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2300
743982351.transcript: You got it! Wait, are we talking fighting or salad?

765113823.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
765113823.transcript: Those training sessions with Lancy are paying off!

768651720.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2900
768651720.transcript: Don't worry! I'll block their attacks!

803521185.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
803521185.transcript: Not a problem at all! Just doing my job!

808276525.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
808276525.transcript: Got that right! We bring the heat, baby!

810411189.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
810411189.transcript: Whoa! Your spear must weigh a ton!

837096578.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2500
837096578.transcript: Yes, ma'am! One finale coming right up!

838982609.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2600
838982609.transcript: You said it'd be. Nothing beats a good snack after a big battle.

842944049.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0400
842944049.transcript: Correction! We tore 'em a new one, Io!

865080825.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
865080825.transcript: How did you even know I was gonna do that!

881708660.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2800
881708660.transcript: The devil sure leaves an impression.

885893196.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
885893196.transcript: Superb maneuver is my middle name!

909512812.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1600
909512812.transcript: Seriously! We've got it down pat!

929084873.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
929084873.transcript: Aww shucks, that's like... more praise than I can handle!

943212241.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
943212241.transcript: Guess there's no holding you back!

970372336.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
970372336.transcript: Hold on! Was this supposed to be a competition? No fair!

971527127.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
971527127.transcript: Wolf and Mud, the canine duo, just bow-wowed the crowd!

992067511.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
992067511.transcript: Just glad to be part of the pack!

1027997814.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
1027997814.transcript: Keep up this pace and we'll be home free!

1054792475.label: PL0900_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
1054792475.transcript: You're the man, Vaseraga! Wish I were half as reliable as you.

64386723.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
64386723.transcript: Holy bows and arrows! You hit nuts!

286989990.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_abs_3
286989990.transcript: Abs away! Said one, done and done.

312026291.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
312026291.transcript: Nah, man! I'm just so pumped to finally be fighting alongside the mighty Seofon!

363785370.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2200
363785370.transcript: Don't worry, I'm basically made of protein and steel!

424995906.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
424995906.transcript: The hunt just can't handle us!

546752135.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
546752135.transcript: Heck yeah! You're a boss, Seofon!

713139192.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
713139192.transcript: One! Two! Three! Four! Five! Six! Ha ha!

867674270.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
867674270.transcript: Gotta blast these abs! One... two... three... four... five... six!

889694267.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2200
889694267.transcript: I can't believe I get to fight beside the strongest swordsman ever!

899310572.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
899310572.transcript: Push-ups comin' up! One... two... three... four... five... six! Feel the burn!

1010047961.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2300
1010047961.transcript: Yeah! On my way to the top!

541636185.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2100
541636185.transcript: Time to put up or shut up!

545112837.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2100
545112837.transcript: Hey, mind if I call you Sandy?

642477955.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
642477955.transcript: I'm no stranger to a workout. It's all about the gains!

759804333.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_1
759804333.transcript: Can't keep a good thing down!

896381821.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
896381821.transcript: Haha! Shh, shh! Shh, huh? Huh, it! Hyaah

1044134474.label: PL0900_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
1044134474.transcript: Dang! How do I get me some of that Primark power?

242695885.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_2
242695885.transcript: Vane Smash! Nom nom nom nom nom! Haha! Tummy happy!

355527428.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_1
355527428.transcript: Chow time! My compliments to me.

576316943.label: PL0900_vo_CMM_emo_onigiri_3
576316943.transcript: I'm starving! Oh man, I needed that.
